description_long: This nightstand is crafted from medium-toned wood and features a minimalist, mid-century modern design. It has a rectangular tabletop with a raised back panel, likely serving as a protective or decorative element. The nightstand includes a single, asymmetrical drawer section on the left side, which extends downward and is integrated seamlessly into the body. The legs are slender, round, and tapered, providing stability and a light visual footprint. The wood grain is visible throughout, and the surface appears smooth with a matte finish. There are no visible handles or decorative elements, emphasizing a clean and functional aesthetic.
description: A mid-century modern wooden nightstand with a raised back panel, single asymmetrical drawer, and tapered legs. The design is minimalist with visible wood grain and a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the raised back panel, main tabletop, and the single left-side drawer with tapered legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the drawer section and the thickness of the back panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the back panel and the symmetry of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the uninterrupted wood surface and the absence of drawers or handles on this side.
